dependencies.name: qtbase
dependencies.reason: Accepted ADR 0003 selects Qt 6 Quick for visible shell surfaces; the value is spike evidence, not a supported minimum.

dependencies.name: qtdeclarative
dependencies.reason: The isolated spike exercised QML, Qt Quick, and Quick Controls from the system Qt package; production usage remains unmeasured.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The X11 spike directly linked XCB for standard dock properties; the production shell target does not yet exist.

unresolved.reason: The minimal Qt modules, direct versus transitive libraries, and supported minimum versions require measurement from the production shell.
AT-SPI behavior was observed in the spike, but production accessibility linkage and packaging must be measured before declaration.
